channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ali Akbar, who's sold newspapers on the streets of Paris for 50 years, is now a knight
item.description: For decades, Ali Akbar has sold papers on the Left Bank of Paris. Last month, France gave the beloved 73-year-old immigrant from Pakistan one of its h...

item.title: 7 key things to know about Trump's tariffs after the Supreme Court decision
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled Friday that President Trump overstepped his authority in ordering double-digit tariffs on nearly everything the U.S. imports. ...

item.title: The economy slowed in the last 3 months of the year — but was still solid in 2025
item.description: The U.S. economy grew 2.2% in 2025, a modest slowdown from 2.4% the previous year. GDP gains were fueled by solid consumer spending and business inves...

item.title: Facing a mental health crisis, an NJ school pulled a beloved novel from English class
item.description: Junot Díaz's The Brief Wondrous Life of Oscar Wao was removed from an English class at the public school. PEN America says it's part of a trend of scr...

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump's tariffs
item.description: The 6-3 ruling is a major blow to the president's signature economic policy.

item.title: Peak XV raises $1.3B, doubles down on AI as global VC rivalry in India heats up
item.description: Peak XV says most of its new capital will target India as the firm prioritizes AI, fintech and cross-border bets while navigating recent partner depar...

item.title: Crews hope to resume recovery of 8 bodies from California avalanche after days of dangerous weather
Prepare for pitch battle: Startup Battlefield 200 nominations are open

item.title: Meta’s metaverse leaves virtual reality
item.description: Meta said it's shifting focus for Horizons Worlds to be "almost exclusively mobile" and that it will separate its Quest VR platform from the virtual w...

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump’s sweeping tariffs, upending central plank of economic agenda
item.description: The Supreme Court has struck down President Donald Trump’s far-reaching global tariffs, handing him a significant loss on an issue crucial to his econ...

item.title: Should I Use My Home Equity to Buy My Next Rental Property? (Rookie Reply)
item.description: Should you use your home equity to buy a rental property? Whether it’s your primary residence or another investment property, this strategy could help...

item.title: AI’s promise to indie filmmakers: faster, cheaper, lonelier
item.description: AI expands access to filmmaking for resource-constrained creators. But as efficiency becomes the industry’s north star, creativity risks being overwhe...

item.title: Lucid Motors slashes 12% of its workforce as it seeks profitability
item.description: The layoffs affect hundreds of full-time workers in the US, according to an internal memo obtained by TechCrunch.

item.title: The Biggest Homebuyer Discounts in Over 12 Years | Feb. 2026 Update
item.description: Homebuyers are getting the biggest discounts on properties in over 12 years—and it’s only getting started. At this point, nobody can refute that a ful...

item.title: Off by Nearly 1 MILLION Jobs? Why New Jobs Report Will Impact Rentals
item.description: Big economic news dropped last week: labor data, inflation rates, and huge jobs revisions. All of these are already impacting the housing market, but ...

item.title: Israeli settlers kill 19-year-old Palestinian American, officials and witnesses say

item.title: The Housing For the 21st Century Act Brings Game Changers For Multifamily Investors
